message:
perf(types): #[inline] Outcome constructors, predicates, and transformers

Outcome is the most commonly used type in the runtime — every task
completion, every combinator result, every error path goes through it.
Added #[inline] to: ok, err, cancelled, panicked, severity, severity_u8,
is_terminal, is_ok, is_err, is_cancelled, is_panicked, into_result,
map, map_err, and_then, unwrap_or, unwrap_or_else, Severity::as_u8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
